_README: Working template for the JS-reverse + browser-automation use case.
Copy this file over engagements/<name>/mcp.json to enable.
command/args  — how to spawn the MCP server as a stdio subprocess.
env           — env vars passed to the subprocess (optional).
target_keys   — per-tool, which arg keys hold a host/URL the scope checker
should validate. Without this, MCP tools bypass scope!
approval_required — tools whose operation always needs ask_user y/N.
Tool names below are conservative guesses; after first run, look at the
'Tools registered:' banner in the REPL to see the actual names exposed
by your MCP version, and adjust target_keys / approval_required to match.
All keys starting with _ are ignored by the manager.

js-reverse._note: If you have it cloned locally, prefer: command: 'node', args: ['/abs/path/to/js-reverse-mcp/dist/index.js']

playwright._note: First run will download browser binaries (~200MB).
